actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 1907113015, guid: e9315cd1bd0bb624886da5b1f92c045e) is OnSceneLoad with UnityEvent OnLoad. Its m_PersistentCalls.m_Calls include: (1) TeleportPlayer.Teleport targeting fileID 692630298; (2) FadeCanvas.StartFadeOut targeting fileID 263574720; both with m_CallState=2. MonoBehaviour_1 (id: 1907113017, guid: 403efda511d335c4a865b0a1f33cc9e0) is LoadScene. Triggering LoadScene.ReloadCurrentScene (no parameters) will reload the active scene, which fires SceneManager.sceneLoaded and causes OnSceneLoad.PlayEvent to invoke OnLoad, thereby executing the two persistent calls (Teleport and StartFadeOut). This GameObject has no Rigidbody and no Collider; 'Trigger' is permitted because attached scripts use UnityEvent and MonoBehaviour methods.
